Process

How it works

Order in four simple steps — from idea to your door.

1

Choose or upload

Pick from our catalog or upload your own STL/OBJ/3MF file for a custom print.

2

Select material & finish

Choose from PLA, PETG, ABS, resin, and more. Pick your color and finish quality.

3

Pay securely

Check out with Stripe or PayPal. Fully protected and encrypted.

4

Receive your print

We print, post-process, and ship to your door in 3–7 business days.

Materials

What we print with

Not sure what material you need? Just ask in your order notes.

PLA

Eco-based, great detail, beginner-friendly

PETG

Strong, slightly flexible, food-safe options

ABS

Heat resistant, durable, functional parts

TPU

Flexible rubber-like for grips & cases

Resin

Ultra-high detail for miniatures & jewelry

ASA

UV & weather resistant, outdoor use

FAQ

Common questions

How long does printing take?

Most orders ship within 3–7 business days. Rush orders (1–2 days) are available for an additional fee — just mention it in your order notes.

What file formats do you accept?

We accept STL, OBJ, 3MF, STEP, and AMF files. Max file size is 50MB per upload. If you only have a sketch or JPEG, contact us to discuss modeling options.

How does payment work for custom orders?

After you submit a quote, we'll review your file and send a price within 24 hours. You only pay after you approve the quote. We accept Stripe and PayPal.

Can I request a specific color?

Yes! We carry a wide range of filament colors. Mention your preferred color in the order notes. For catalog items, use the special requests field or email us after ordering.

Do you offer refunds or reprints?

If there's a defect or print failure on our end, we'll reprint or refund at no charge. Send a photo within 7 days of delivery. Custom files with design issues are evaluated case by case.

Can you handle bulk or business orders?

Absolutely. We offer volume discounts for orders of 10+ units. Contact us directly at studio@chiefcraftstudio.com to discuss pricing and timelines.
